falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern similarity and suggest a reversal in trend, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and suggesting a potential top instead of a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage drops below 50% for bottom_2024_aug within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in pattern similarity would invalidate the foundational premise of the current analysis, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
